
---
title: ISSS626
---

Welcome to **Geospatial Analytics and Application (ISSS626)**. This website collects my course work and hands-on exercises. Use the top navigation bar to open each page.

::: callout-note
### How to use this site

-   **Home** (this page): Overview, quick links, and status.
-   **About**: Short profile of the student.
-   **Hand-on Exercise** (menu): Open individual assignments.
:::

## Quick links

-   👉 **Hand-on Exercise 1**: [Open the assignment](Hands-on_Ex01/hand-on_ex01)
-   👉 **About**: [Student profile](about.qmd)

## Objectives of my hands-on work

1.  Demonstrate step-by-step workflows for geospatial tasks that a beginner can follow.
2.  Use clear, descriptive names and relative file paths so the website renders correctly on Netlify.
3.  Provide reproducible results with the same structure for every assignment.
